name: Reign-Beaux, Overking of Dark World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レイン
name_jp_tl: Reign, Devil King of Dark World
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your GY) by returning 1 Level 7 or lower "Dark World" monster you control to the hand. If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher "Dark World" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Reign-Beaux, Overking of Dark World", then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dark World" monster from your Deck or GY to either field.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your GY) by returning 1 Level 7 or lower "Dark World" monster you control to the hand. If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher "Dark World" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Reign-Beaux, Overking of Dark World", then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dark World" monster from your Deck or GY to either field.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your GY) by returning 1 Level 7 or lower "Dark World" monster you control to the hand. If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher "Dark World" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Reign-Beaux, Overking of Dark World", then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dark World" monster from your Deck or GY to either field.

action: Returns from field to hand for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
